\subsection*{Running Results Snapshot}
This fragment is generated directly from \texttt{gpt\_4qubit\_results.json}, \texttt{anthropic\_4qubit\_results.json} and \texttt{combined\_4qubit\_fit.json}.

The current finished run contains 6912 usable evaluations. The overall mean normalized error is 0.533, with median 0.500, 90th percentile 1.000, and 95th percentile 1.000. Exact-correct outputs occur on 0.268 of samples, while 0.431 of samples are effectively full-error failures.
The best model by mean error is \texttt{claude-opus-4-1-20250805} (0.298), while the weakest is \texttt{gpt-4o-mini} (0.643). The best depth setting is 1 with mean error 0.527. The hardest category is \texttt{circuit\_evolution} (0.842), and the easiest is \texttt{operator\_composition} (0.245).
The fitted scaling law is $d_{phys} \approx k S^{-2.444} D^{0.175}$, with $\alpha=2.444 [2.150, 2.723]$ and $\beta=0.175 [-0.168, 0.508]$.
